description:
## Problem

The Publish GitHub Action fails on every merge to main because `changeset publish` tries to publish `@helixir/core` and `@helixir/github-action` to npm. The `@helixir` scope doesn't exist on the npm registry, so both get 404 errors, and the entire publish step fails with exit code 1.

The root `helixir` package publishes fine (or is skipped if version is unchanged). The failure is exclusively from the two internal workspace packages.

## Evidence

PR #72 merge to main (2026-03-17): Publish workflow run 23172452954 failed.
```
🦋 error: E404 Not Found - PUT https://registry.npmjs.org/@helixir%2fcore - Not found
🦋 error: E404 Not Found - PUT https://registry.npmjs.org/@helixir%2fgithub-action - Not found
🦋 packages failed to publish:
🦋  @helixir/core@0.1.0
🦋  @helixir/github-action@0.1.0
```

## Fix

Add `"private": true` to both internal package.json files so changesets skips them entirely:

1. `packages/core/package.json` — add `"private": true`
2. `packages/github-action/package.json` — add `"private": true` (if this file exists; if the package is defined elsewhere, find and mark it)

## Verification

After fix, `changeset publish` should output:
- `helixir` — published (or skipped if no version bump)
- `@helixir/core` — skipped (private)
- `@helixir/github-action` — skipped (private)

## Acceptance Criteria

- Both internal packages have `"private": true` in their package.json
- No other changes needed
- Tests still pass, type-check passes
title: fix: mark internal packages as private to fix publish pipeline

descriptionHistory.description:

```

🦋 error: E404 Not Found - PUT https://registry.npmjs.org/@helixir%2fgithub-action - Not found
🦋 packages failed to publish:
🦋  @helixir/core@0.1.0
🦋  @helixir/github-action@0.1.0
```

1. `packages/core/package.json` — add `"private": true`

- `@helixir/github-action` — skipped (private)

## Acceptance Criteria

- Both internal packages have `"private": true` in their package.json
- No other changes needed
- Tests still pass, type-check passes
